content.zh: 开会时，你通常在做什么？
content.en: What do you usually do during meetings?

content.zh: 认真听讲，偶尔做笔记
content.en: Listen carefully and take notes occasionally

content.zh: 脑子已经飘到午饭吃什么了
content.en: Already thinking about lunch

content.zh: 假装在听，实际在摸鱼
content.en: Pretending to listen, actually slacking off

content.zh: 积极发言，推动讨论
content.en: Actively speaking up and driving discussion

content.zh: 消息发出去后，你第一反应是什么？
content.en: What's your first reaction after sending a message?

content.zh: 秒回啊，反正闲着也是闲着
content.en: Reply instantly, have nothing better to do anyway

content.zh: 发了就后悔，想着要不要撤回
content.en: Regret it immediately, wondering if I should recall it

content.zh: 消息已读不回，等心情好了再说
content.en: Read but not replying, will respond when in the mood

content.zh: 看一眼，记住了，等有空再回
content.en: Glance at it, remember it, reply when free

content.zh: 接到一个紧急任务，你的反应是？
content.en: How do you react when given an urgent task?

content.zh: 先放下手头的事，立刻开始做
content.en: Put everything down and start immediately

content.zh: 先想一下能不能推掉
content.en: First think about whether I can push it off

content.zh: 嘴上说好，手上继续摸鱼
content.en: Say okay but keep slacking off

content.zh: Deadline 前一天再开始冲刺
content.en: Sprint on the day before deadline

content.zh: 群里有八卦，你的态度是？
content.en: When there's gossip in the group chat, what's your attitude?

content.zh: 默默吃瓜，绝不发言
content.en: Silently enjoying the gossip, never commenting

content.zh: 冲在吃瓜第一线，追问细节
content.en: On the front lines of gossip, asking for details

content.zh: 我是谁？我在哪？与我无关
content.en: Who am I? Where am I? None of my business

content.zh: 假装没看到，但悄悄记住了
content.en: Pretend not to see it, but quietly remember it

content.zh: 你觉得自己是什么时间段效率最高？
content.en: When do you think your efficiency is highest?

content.zh: 早上，脑子清醒的时候
content.en: Morning, when my mind is fresh

content.zh: 下午，边犯困边硬撑
content.en: Afternoon, fighting drowsiness while pushing through

content.zh: 晚上，灵感爆发期
content.en: Night, when inspiration strikes

content.zh: Deadline 前半小时
content.en: Half an hour before deadline

content.zh: 你点外卖一般要花多久？
content.en: How long does it take you to order food delivery?

content.zh: 打开 App，三秒下单
content.en: Open the app, order in three seconds

content.zh: 货比三家，看评论，纠结半小时
content.en: Compare options, read reviews, agonize for half an hour

content.zh: 随便选一个，反正都差不多
content.en: Just pick one randomly, they're all the same anyway

content.zh: 让别人帮忙选
content.en: Let someone else decide

content.zh: 你如何看待「算了」这个词？
content.en: What's your view on the word 'forget it'?

content.zh: 人生哲学，能算则算
content.en: Life philosophy, skip what you can

content.zh: 表面算了，心里过不去
content.en: Say it's fine on the outside, but can't let it go inside

content.zh: 不算！必须争个对错
content.en: No way! Must fight for what's right

content.zh: 算了，下次再说吧
content.en: Forget it, we'll talk about it next time

content.zh: 聚会冷场时，你会怎么做？
content.en: What do you do when a party gets awkward and quiet?

content.zh: 主动说个笑话或带节奏
content.en: Take the initiative to tell a joke or set the mood

content.zh: 低头玩手机，假装没注意到
content.en: Look at phone, pretend not to notice

content.zh: 默默观察，心里已经写了八百字点评
content.en: Quietly observe, already wrote an 800-word commentary in mind

content.zh: 突然说一句话，成功把气氛带歪
content.en: Suddenly say something that successfully derails the mood

content.zh: 你做计划时，一般会？
content.en: When making plans, what do you usually do?

content.zh: 列清单、设闹钟、规划到分钟
content.en: Make lists, set alarms, plan down to the minute

content.zh: 有个大概方向就行了
content.en: Just have a general direction

content.zh: 计划写得很好，执行再说
content.en: Plans are well-written, execution comes later

content.zh: 从不做计划，走一步看一步
content.en: Never make plans, take it as it comes

content.zh: 别人发消息说「在吗」，你的反应是？
content.en: When someone messages you 'Are you there?', what's your reaction?

content.zh: 直接问什么事
content.en: Directly ask what's up

content.zh: 看了消息，但假装没看到
content.en: Saw the message, but pretend not to

content.zh: 等对方说正事再回
content.en: Wait for them to state their business before responding

content.zh: 秒回，但心里在犯嘀咕
content.en: Reply instantly, but secretly wondering

content.zh: 抽卡/抽奖时，你觉得自己运气如何？
content.en: When drawing cards/entering raffles, how's your luck?

content.zh: 从来不中，谢谢参与专业户
content.en: Never win, professional 'thank you for participating' member

content.zh: 还行，偶尔能中
content.en: Not bad, occasionally win something

content.zh: 欧皇附体，一抽就中
content.en: Blessed by luck, win first try

content.zh: 总是差一点点就中
content.en: Always just miss winning

content.zh: 你聊天时更喜欢？
content.en: What do you prefer when chatting?

content.zh: 发表情包，一图胜千言
content.en: Send memes, a picture says a thousand words

content.zh: 发表情包，然后补一大段话
content.en: Send meme, then add a long explanation

content.zh: 纯文字，惜字如金
content.en: Plain text only, economical with words

content.zh: 看到什么都想吐槽几句
content.en: Want to comment on everything I see

content.zh: 你更倾向于哪种休息方式？
content.en: What kind of rest do you prefer?

content.zh: 出门社交，充电靠朋友
content.en: Go out and socialize, recharge with friends

content.zh: 在家躺着，谁也别找我
content.en: Lie at home, don't bother me

content.zh: 换个地方继续卷
content.en: Keep grinding in a different place

content.zh: 断网闭关，谁也别想找到我
content.en: Go offline completely, no one can find me

content.zh: 当有人说了一句意味深长的话时，你？
content.en: When someone says something thought-provoking, you?

content.zh: 表面上：哦。实际上：他在暗示什么？
content.en: Outwardly: Oh. Inwardly: What is he implying?

content.zh: 直接问清楚是什么意思
content.en: Directly ask what they mean

content.zh: 脑子里已经演完一整部剧了
content.en: Already acted out a whole drama in my head

content.zh: 没听懂，但假装懂了
content.en: Don't understand but pretend I do

content.zh: 情绪上头时，你会？
content.en: When you're emotional, what do you do?

content.zh: 先发完再说，撤回算我输
content.en: Post first, regret later. Recall and I lose

content.zh: 憋着，不想让人看出来
content.en: Hold it in, don't want others to notice

content.zh: 写小作文，发疯但有逻辑
content.en: Write an essay, crazy but logical

content.zh: 删掉已经打好的字，假装什么都没发生
content.en: Delete typed words, pretend nothing happened

description.zh: 15道趣味测试题，揭示你的隐藏人格
description.en: 15 fun questions to reveal your hidden personality
